title: Eating Animations x Born In Chaos
description: Add compatibility between Eating Animations and the food of the mod Born In Chaos and variants of some other Born In Chaos theme mod
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility (FORGE/FABRIC)**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-more-mod-compatibility) ### Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility **Add compatibility for mods with [Eating animation(FORGE/FABRIC)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)** ### Mod Compatibility & Fixes: - [**Born in Chaos**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos) - **Born in Chaos Delight** (from [**Compat Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/compat-delight)) ![v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fc4940ea45c3ab18807880b01f07930bfdc0104.png)
